title: Skillet Sausage Fajitas
description: Quick and spicy fajitas made with smoky sausage and robust flavors. Serve with warm flour tortillas and your favorite toppings.
instructions: Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add olive oil and cook sausage until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add more oil if necessary, then cook the onion and bell pepper until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add fajita seasoning and stir to combine.
Return sausage to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by placing the sausage and vegetable mixture onto the tortillas and serving.
